nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Say to Aaron, ‘Stretch out your staff and strike the dust of the earth, that it may become gnats through all the land of Egypt.’ ”

esv.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Say to Aaron, ‘Stretch out your staff and strike the dust of the earth, so that it may become gnats in all the land of Egypt.’”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要對亞倫說：‘伸出你的手杖，擊打地上的塵土，使塵土在埃及全地都變成虱子。’”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你吩咐亚伦用杖击打地上的尘土，使埃及境内的尘土变成虱子。”
